title: campanula × ursaria
intro: Campanula × ursaria, also known as the Ursinia, is a hybrid flowering plant that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ursinia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural remedy for respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Ursinia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
